creator: danger@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

  I have been notified, that there was found a problem with the
  mod_simple_vhost lighttpd module after the release of 1.4.21:
  http://redmine.lighttpd.net/issues/1905

  Attached diff includes the fix for this problem as well.

-- 
Best regards,
 Daniel                          mailto:danger@FreeBSD.org
